calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

David Francis Perry, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff(s) Wells Fargo Bank, National Assoc.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) C.H.T. Properties Development, a partnership; Sanh Huyhn, Kwok H. Chow aka Kwok Hing Chow, aka Kwok Chow for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38346.63
Prejudgment Interest - $4828.52
Attorney's Fees - $ 2825.00
Costs - $680.68
Total judgment in the amount of $46680.83

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
